h129e2ad7g2ef6g4803gbb38gabc7df9f3be2: You ever scare me like that again, and I'll feed you to a gnoll.
h8264dd8cg0708g45daga7efge22235c8a0b4: You saved our little girl and stopped the ritual. Thank you - we are in your debt.
h27afc69fg64c7g4c60gb0b4gdb07e27caccb: It's not much, but here. Never thought I'd call a drow 'friend' but know this - if you call, we'll come running. No matter what.
h8d8c56deg1bc9g49aaga7dbg0598fb8e9c82: I hope we'll meet again under better circumstances.
h8d8493ccgac50g4fd6g88fage828d225441e: Well it's all we got. Arabella?
h332ce8f1gaa86g4abeg8172g1a007efac679: I saved your daughter - got anything more than a thanks for me?
hcec109b5gab11g4e9egada3gdc6eb392788c: I did - but I was robbed. You wouldn't know anything about that, would you?
h24b8ffd7g047bg4b03g8ad4g48710208f726: Marri. All we can offer is our thanks. Arabella?
h4afd6a45g51aeg4727g83e4g9353260b329a: This could've ended badly - keep her in line from now on.
h95a5ead5g6fb9g4da9g8fc8g378cf415ed1c: The nine hells will sooner freeze over. But we'll try.
h1601788bg8c55g4f31gb27bg9de5e6d1d22b: No more light-fingered antics - right, Arabella?
h762de5aegfd43g45edg8e91gd236cfa5a16c: It's not much, but here. Know that if you call, we'll come running. No matter what.
hc2853d35g6b1bg4f40gb89ag8595ca824ed7: Our little hellion told us what happened. Thank you - don't know what we'd do without her.
